query:
SELECT
            id "id!",
            name "name!",
            hash "hash!",
            payload "payload!",
            (SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM attempts_failed af WHERE af.message_id = id) "attempted!"
        FROM messages_unattempted
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            id "id!",
            name "name!",
            hash "hash!",
            payload "payload!",
            (SELECT COUNT(*)::INTEGER FROM attempts_failed af WHERE af.message_id = id) "attempted!"
        FROM messages_attempted
